productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bonkers Baby Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 11 cm x 19 cmCrafted from velvet with synthetic and jute overlaysBuckle design upper with magnetic button closure and three-fold open styleOne main compartment with eleven card holders, three insert pockets and an id card holderOne zippered pocket at the backPrinted branding on the backCareWipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
